verses.1: Woe to those who devise iniquity
verses.2: They covet fields and seize them,
verses.4: In that day they will take up a parable against you,
verses.5: Therefore you will have no one who divides the land by lot in the LORD’s assembly.
verses.7: Shall it be said, O house of Jacob,
verses.8: But lately my people have risen up as an enemy.
verses.9: You drive the women of my people out from their pleasant houses;
verses.11: If a man walking in a spirit of falsehood lies, saying,
verses.12: I will surely assemble all of you, Jacob.
verses.13: He who breaks open the way goes up before them.
